config.section.title: (TTG) GMCM Advanced Search
config.section.tooltip: Search inside GMCM authors, mod names, UniqueIDs, Nexus IDs, option labels, tooltips, field IDs, and config keys.
config.open-menu.name: Open search menu
config.open-menu.tooltip: Hotkey to open the GMCM Advanced Search menu.
config.show-details.name: Show Advanced Details
config.show-details.tooltip: Show extra metadata under each search result, including section/page, tooltip text, field ID, config key path, and option type.
config.show-tooltips.name: Show Mod Tooltips
config.show-tooltips.tooltip: Show GMCM-style hover tooltips with the result mod name and description.
config.include-content-packs.name: Include content packs
config.include-content-packs.tooltip: Include GMCM-registered content packs when searching.
config.include-config-fallback.name: Include config.json fallback
config.include-config-fallback.tooltip: Also search config.json keys when GMCM option metadata can't be fully read.
config.search-values.name: Search config values
config.search-values.tooltip: Also index simple config.json values. This can produce more noisy results.
config.debug-logging.name: Debug logging
config.debug-logging.tooltip: Log index counts and reflection details for troubleshooting.
config.tip: Tip: search results show matching authors first, then matching mod names, UniqueIDs, or Nexus IDs with matching option labels, tooltips, field IDs, and config keys grouped underneath.
mobile-app.name: GMCM Search
message.gmcm-not-installed: Generic Mod Config Menu is not installed.
message.no-options-found: No GMCM options or config keys found.
message.open-failed: That entry couldn't be opened in GMCM.
menu.title: (TTG) GMCM Advanced Search
status.search-results: {{count}} result(s). Results order: Authors → Mods → Options.
result.author-advanced: Click to show this author's installed mods.
result.author-tooltip.one: {{count}} installed mod. Click to list this author's mods.
result.author-tooltip.many: {{count}} installed mods. Click to list this author's mods.
